items.title: UCL Global Undergraduate Scholarships 2026-2027 | Scholars4Dev
items.institution: International Scholarships for Developing Countries | Scholarships for Development | International Undergraduate Scholarships, Master Scholarships, PhD Scholarships for International Students 2026-2027
items.benefits: Up to 33 scholarships are available in 2025/26, 10 of them full scholarships of tuition and maintenance allowance.
items.funding: Up to 33 scholarships are available in 2025/26, 10 of them full scholarships of tuition and maintenance allowance.
requirements: The UCL Global Undergraduate Scholarship aims to enable and encourage international students from low income backgrounds to pursue full-time Undergraduate degree studies at UCL.
You need to have submitted an admission application to UCL in order to apply for the scholarship.
All undergraduate degree rogrammes in any subject offered at the University • AND have submitted an admission application for a full-time Undergraduate degree at UCL in 2026/27.
criteria: The UCL Global Undergraduate Scholarship aims to enable and encourage international students from low income backgrounds to pursue full-time Undergraduate degree studies at UCL.
You need to have submitted an admission application to UCL in order to apply for the scholarship.

items.eligibility: The UCL Global Undergraduate Scholarship aims to enable and encourage international students from low income backgrounds to pursue full-time Undergraduate degree studies at UCL.
items.summary: 2026-27 UCL Global Masters Scholarships are open to international students from low-income backgrounds. The scholarships are towards Undergraduate Degree Programmes in any subject offered at University College London in UK. Deadline is 27 April 2026. Course starts September 2026.
items.matchNote: Possible fit: this is a strong official lead, but one strict criterion still needs manual confirmation.

items.title: Clarendon | University of Oxford
items.funding: Clarendon scholarship cover course fees and provide a grant for living expenses for the period of fee liability of a scholar's course.
requirements: Clarendon Scholarships are awarded on the basis of academic excellence and potential across all graduate degree-bearing subjects at the University of Oxford.
All full-time and part-time DPhil and Master’s courses are eligible.
items.eligibility: There are no restrictions on nationality, ordinary residence or field of study.
items.summary: Clarendon not only offers over 200 new, fully-funded scholarships each year to assist outstanding graduate scholars, but also the opportunity to join one of the most active, internationally diverse, and multidisciplinary communities at Oxford. In 2025/26 Clarendon is celebrating its 25th intake of exceptional scholars.
items.matchNote: Best fit: this page matched the funding, stipend, location, and Iraq eligibility checks.
items.benefits: Clarendon scholarship cover course fees and provide a grant for living expenses for the period of fee liability of a scholar's course.
criteria: There are no restrictions on nationality, ordinary residence or field of study.

items.title: Knight-Hennessy Scholars Funding
items.funding: A fellowship applied directly to cover tuition and associated fees Financial Support for Cost of Attendance The Medical School will fund the remaining years, consistent with its standard funding commitment to MD students, which consists of tuition support and stipend.
requirements: Knight-Hennessy scholars receive funding for up to three years for any graduate degree(s) at Stanford.
This funding applies to the degree(s) to which scholars are preparing to enroll at the time of scholar selection.

If a scholar is admitted to a degree program that exceeds three years — such as an MD, PhD, or Stanford dual- or joint-degree program — then funding is based on the graduate degree program’s standard funding commitment.
items.eligibility: Fellowship stipends are taxable, but not subject to withholding (except for international students from a country without a tax treaty).
items.summary: Scholars receive funding for up to three years for any graduate degree(s) at Stanford, applicable to the degree(s) they plan to enroll in at the time of selection.
items.matchNote: Best fit: this page matched the funding, stipend, location, and Iraq eligibility checks.

items.title: Postgraduate Cambridge University Scholarship | Gates Cambridge
items.funding: A fully funded graduate education for future leaders committed to improving the lives of others..
requirements: Each year Gates Cambridge offers c.80 full-cost scholarships to outstanding applicants from countries outside the UK to pursue a postgraduate degree in any subject available at the University of Cambridge.
You should let the Trust know ASAP if you are awarded any funding towards your degree at Cambridge.

items.title: The Swedish Institute Scholarship for Global Professionals
items.funding: The Scholarship for Global Professionals is a competitive fully-funded scholarship that includes:
requirements: Be a citizen of one of the 34 eligible countries for the SI Scholarship for Global Professionals;
You must be a citizen of one of the 34 eligible countries to be eligible to apply.
Apply for a master’s programme that is eligible for the SI scholarship;
items.eligibility: countries are eligible to apply for the SI Scholarship for Global Professionals: Armenia, Azerbaijan, Bangladesh, Belarus, Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, Ecuador, Egypt, Ethiopia, Georgia, Guatemala, Indonesia, Iraq
items.summary: The Swedish Institute Scholarships for Global Professionals (SISGP) is awarded to ambitious global professionals for full-time master's studies in Sweden.

items.title: KAIST University Undergraduate Scholarship 2026 (Regular Track)
items.benefits: HUST University Wuhan CSC Scholarship 2026 in China (Fully Funded) VISIT HERE TO APPLY FOR KAIST UNDERGRADUATE SCHOLARSHIP Details About KAIST University Undergraduate Scholarship 2026 How to Apply for the KAIST University Undergraduate Scholarship 2026?
items.funding: HUST University Wuhan CSC Scholarship 2026 in China (Fully Funded) VISIT HERE TO APPLY FOR KAIST UNDERGRADUATE SCHOLARSHIP Details About KAIST University Undergraduate Scholarship 2026 How to Apply for the KAIST University Undergraduate Scholarship 2026?
requirements: Upon being selected for admission, you will automatically be entitled to the KAIST Scholarship.
Therefore, you must apply for admission, and you will automatically receive the KAIST Scholarship.
Applicants who hold Korean Citizenship (including dual citizenship) are NOT eligible to apply as international students.
